# Palivizumab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Palivizumab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Palivizumab</strong> 目前有 <strong>16 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Palivizumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Synagis is indicated for the prevention of serious lower-respiratory-tract disease requiring hospitalisation caused by respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) in children at high risk for RSV disease: ...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>benign neoplasm of tongue（99.9%）</li>
<li>epiglottis neoplasm（99.9%）</li>
<li>cervical neuroblastoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of hypopharynx（99.9%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of floor of mouth（99.9%）</li>
<li>tumor of testis and paratestis（99.9%）</li>
<li>cystic neoplasm（99.9%）</li>
<li>schwannoma of jugular foramen（99.9%）</li>
<li>mesenchymoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>thyroglossal duct cyst（99.9%）</li>
<li>nasal cavity inverting papilloma（99.9%）</li>
<li>inner ear neoplasm（99.9%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of buccal mucosa（99.9%）</li>
<li>jugular foramen meningioma（99.9%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of nasal cavity（99.9%）</li>
<li>chondroid hamartoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>bronchial adenomas/carcinoids childhood（99.9%）</li>
<li>ductal or ductular proliferation（99.9%）</li>
<li>non-seminomatous lesion（99.9%）</li>
<li>vestibulocochlear nerve neoplasm（99.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/palivizumab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
